results.title: 1st ODI: Axar Patel picks career-best 4-62 as India restrict England to 258
results.description: Birmingham, July 14 (IANS) All-rounder Axar Patel brought out his career-best performance of 4-62 as Joe Root was left stranded on the other end at 76 to guide England to 258 all out in 47.5 overs in the first ODI against India at the Edgbaston Stadium in Birmingham on Tuesday. England bounced back from a ...

results.title: NYSS to start closing week at Buffalo Raceway
results.description: HAMBURG, N.Y. — It's closing week for the 2026 season at Buffalo Raceway. While this year's chapter is coming to an end at the Hamburg half-mile oval, 15 freshman filly trotters will basically be beginning their racing careers in a...

results.title: Selector announced
results.description: Lauren Rowles has been announced as the new National Women's Selector The post Selector announced appeared first on Cricket Ireland .

results.title: Natchez All Stars 6U season ends at state tournament after memorable summer
results.description: Natchez 6U All Stars close summer at Dixie Youth state tourney, going 1-2 with a 23-3 rout of Philadelphia, as coach Wyatt Craig praises the team’s growth and surpassed expectations.
